You are executing a bridled pace for Job Jockey heat ₣AP, pace ₢APAAo "replace-skopeo-with-crane".

## Context

The GCB (Google Cloud Build) pipeline has a step that uses skopeo (from quay.io) to push OCI archives to Google Artifact Registry. quay.io aggressively garbage-collects digests, breaking pinned image references. We're replacing skopeo with crane, which is already available via `RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF` (gcr.io-hosted).

## Your Task — Agent A: bash/env files

You must make ALL of the following changes. Read each file before editing.

### 1. Rename rbgjb07 script
Run: `git mv Tools/rbw/rbgjb/rbgjb07-push-with-skopeo.sh Tools/rbw/rbgjb/rbgjb07-push-with-crane.sh`

### 2. Rewrite rbgjb07-push-with-crane.sh
Replace the entire file content with this script:

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# RBGJB Step 07: Push OCI layout to GAR using crane
# Builder: gcr.io/go-containerregistry/gcrane (via RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF)
# Substitutions: _RBGY_GAR_LOCATION, _RBGY_GAR_PROJECT, _RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY, _RBGY_MONIKER
#
# OCI Layout Bridge Phase 2: Push the multi-platform OCI archive from /workspace/oci-layout.tar
# to Artifact Registry using crane. Auth provided by gcloud auth configure-docker (step 03).

set -euo pipefail

test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION}"   || { echo "_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION missing"   >&2; exit 1; }
test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT}"    || { echo "_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT missing"    >&2; exit 1; }
test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY}" || { echo "_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY missing" >&2; exit 1; }
test -n "${_RBGY_MONIKER}"        || { echo "_RBGY_MONIKER missing"        >&2; exit 1; }
test -s .tag_base                  || { echo "tag base not derived"         >&2; exit 1; }
test -f /workspace/oci-layout.tar  || { echo "OCI archive not found"        >&2; exit 1; }

TAG_BASE="$(cat .tag_base)"
IMAGE_URI="${_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION}${_RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT}/${_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${_RBGY_MONIKER}:${TAG_BASE}${_RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"

mkdir -p /workspace/oci-layout
tar xf /workspace/oci-layout.tar -C /workspace/oci-layout

echo "Pushing OCI layout to ${IMAGE_URI}..."
crane push /workspace/oci-layout "${IMAGE_URI}" --index

echo "${IMAGE_URI}" > .image_uri
echo "Done. Image available at: ${IMAGE_URI}"
```

### 3. Update Tools/rbw/rbf_Foundry.sh
Find the line containing `rbgjb07-push-with-skopeo.sh` and change it to reference `rbgjb07-push-with-crane.sh`, use `RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF` instead of `RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF`, and change the step ID from `push-with-skopeo` to `push-with-crane`. The entrypoint should change from `bash` to `sh` since the gcrane container uses `/bin/sh`.

### 4. Delete SKOPEO lines from rbrr.env
Remove these two lines (the comment and the variable):
```
# skopeo: OCI registry copy tool (~Feb 2026)
RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF="quay.io/skopeo/stable@sha256:ac64183a852e2cb3f017d15e003bf6d6ed8eaf92b776ca9ce5a30552635a717f"
```

### 5. Remove SKOPEO from Tools/rbw/rbrr_cli.sh
- Remove the line containing `RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF` in the regime display section (around line 109)
- Remove the line containing `RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF` in the refresh list (around line 204)

### 6. Remove SKOPEO from Tools/rbw/rbrr_regime.sh
- Remove the default assignment line: `RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF="${RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF:-}"`
- Remove SKOPEO from the env presence check (the long line with multiple variable checks around line 62)
- Remove SKOPEO from the rollup line (around line 95)
- Remove the validation line: `buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF`

### 7. Fix stale log in Tools/rbw/rbv_PodmanVM.sh
Change: `buc_step "Ignite machine ready with skopeo installed"`
To: `buc_step "Ignite machine ready with crane installed"`

## IMPORTANT RULES
- Do NOT use `cd` — use absolute paths only. Working directory is /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster
- Read each file before editing to see exact current content
- Do NOT run jjx_close or mark the pace complete
- Do NOT commit — the calling agent will handle commits
- Report what you changed when done

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→# RBGJB Step 07: Push OCI layout to GAR using Skopeo
     3→# Builder: quay.io/skopeo/stable:latest
     4→# Substitutions: _RBGY_GAR_LOCATION, _RBGY_GAR_PROJECT, _RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY, _RBGY_MONIKER
     5→#
     6→# OCI Layout Bridge Phase 2: Push the multi-platform OCI archive from /workspace/oci-layout.tar
     7→# to Artifact Registry using Skopeo with proper authentication.
     8→#
     9→# Why Skopeo: Skopeo runs in a container that has access to Cloud Build's metadata server,
    10→# allowing it to fetch GAR credentials. This solves the BuildKit credential isolation problem.
    11→
    12→set -euo pipefail
    13→
    14→# Required inputs
    15→test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION}"   || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION missing"   >&2; exit 1)
    16→test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT}"    || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT missing"    >&2; exit 1)
    17→test -n "${_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY}" || (echo "_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY missing" >&2; exit 1)
    18→test -n "${_RBGY_MONIKER}"        || (echo "_RBGY_MONIKER missing"        >&2; exit 1)
    19→test -s .tag_base                  || (echo "tag base not derived"         >&2; exit 1)
    20→test -f /workspace/oci-layout.tar  || (echo "OCI archive not found"        >&2; exit 1)
    21→
    22→TAG_BASE="$(cat .tag_base)"
    23→IMAGE_URI="${_RBGY_GAR_LOCATION}${_RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${_RBGY_GAR_PROJECT}/${_RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${_RBGY_MONIKER}:${TAG_BASE}${_RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
    24→
    25→# Debug: show what tools are available
    26→echo "=== Debug: Available tools ==="
    27→which curl wget skopeo cat ls || true
    28→echo "=== Debug: /workspace contents ==="
    29→ls -la /workspace/ || true
    30→echo "=== Debug: Archive size ==="
    31→ls -la /workspace/oci-layout.tar || true
    32→
    33→echo "Fetching access token from metadata server..."
    34→# Try curl first, fall back to wget if curl not available
    35→if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    36→  TOKEN_JSON=$(curl -sf -H "Metadata-Flavor: Google" \
    37→    http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/service-accounts/default/token)
    38→elif command -v wget >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    39→  TOKEN_JSON=$(wget -qO- --header="Metadata-Flavor: Google" \
    40→    http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/service-accounts/default/token)
    41→else
    42→  echo "ERROR: Neither curl nor wget available in container" >&2
    43→  exit 1
    44→fi
    45→
    46→if [ -z "$TOKEN_JSON" ]; then
    47→  echo "Failed to fetch access token from metadata server" >&2
    48→  exit 1
    49→fi
    50→
    51→echo "Token JSON received (length: ${#TOKEN_JSON})"
    52→
    53→# Extract access_token field from JSON
    54→# Try multiple parsing approaches for compatibility
    55→if command -v grep >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    56→  AR_TOKEN=$(echo "$TOKEN_JSON" | grep -o '"access_token":"[^"]*"' | sed 's/"access_token":"\([^"]*\)"/\1/')
    57→else
    58→  # Fallback: use shell parameter expansion
    59→  AR_TOKEN="${TOKEN_JSON#*\"access_token\":\"}"
    60→  AR_TOKEN="${AR_TOKEN%%\"*}"
    61→fi
    62→
    63→if [ -z "$AR_TOKEN" ]; then
    64→  echo "Failed to parse access token from response" >&2
    65→  echo "Response was: $TOKEN_JSON" >&2
    66→  exit 1
    67→fi
    68→
    69→echo "Token parsed successfully (length: ${#AR_TOKEN})"
    70→
    71→echo "Pushing OCI archive to ${IMAGE_URI}..."
    72→# Use --dest-registry-token instead of --dest-creds per Google Cloud blog:
    73→# https://cloud.google.com/blog/topics/developers-practitioners/five-ways-skopeo-can-simplify-your-google-cloud-container-workflow
    74→skopeo copy \
    75→  --all \
    76→  --dest-registry-token "${AR_TOKEN}" \
    77→  "oci-archive:/workspace/oci-layout.tar" \
    78→  "docker://${IMAGE_URI}"
    79→
    80→echo "Push successful. Writing IMAGE_URI for downstream steps..."
    81→echo "${IMAGE_URI}" > .image_uri
    82→echo "Done. Image available at: ${IMAGE_URI}"
    83→

   147→  # Entrypoint 'bash' uses args ["-lc", script], 'sh' uses ["-c", script]
   148→  # Note: Step 05 (buildx-create) was merged into step 06 because Cloud Build
   149→  # steps run in isolated containers - builder state doesn't persist across steps
   150→  #
   151→  # OCI Layout Bridge pattern (steps 06-08):
   152→  # - Step 06: buildx exports to /workspace/oci-layout (no auth needed)
   153→  # - Step 07: Skopeo pushes from oci-layout to GAR (with metadata auth)
   154→  # - Step 08: Syft analyzes from oci-layout (faster, more accurate)

   157→  # Delimiter is | because image refs contain colons (sha256 digests)
   158→  # Note: builder images pinned via RBRR_GCB_*_IMAGE_REF variables
   159→  local z_step_defs=(
   160→    "rbgjb01-derive-tag-base.sh|${RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF}|bash|derive-tag-base"
   161→    "rbgjb02-get-docker-token.sh|${RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF}|bash|get-docker-token"
   162→    "rbgjb03-docker-login-gar.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|docker-login-gar"
   163→    "rbgjb04-qemu-binfmt.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|qemu-binfmt"
   164→    "rbgjb06-build-and-export.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|build-and-export"
   165→    "rbgjb07-push-with-skopeo.sh|${RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF}|bash|push-with-skopeo"
   166→    "rbgjb08-sbom-and-summary.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|sbom-and-summary"
   167→    "rbgjb10-assemble-metadata.sh|${RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF}|sh|assemble-metadata"
   168→    "rbgjb09-build-and-push-metadata.sh|${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|build-and-push-metadata"
   169→  )
   170→
   171→  local z_def=""
   172→  local z_script=""
   173→  local z_builder=""
   174→  local z_entrypoint=""
   175→  local z_id=""
   176→  local z_script_path=""
   177→  local z_body=""
   178→  local z_arg_flag=""
   179→  local z_body_file=""
   180→  local z_escaped_file=""
   181→  local z_steps_file=""
   182→  local z_accumulator_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}steps.json"
   183→
   184→  buc_log_args "Initializing empty steps array"
   185→  echo "[]" > "${z_accumulator_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize steps JSON"
   186→
   187→  for z_def in "${z_step_defs[@]}"; do
   188→    IFS='|' read -r z_script z_builder z_entrypoint z_id <<< "${z_def}"
   189→    z_script_path="${ZRBF_RBGJB_STEPS_DIR}/${z_script}"
   190→    z_body_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_body.txt"
   191→    z_escaped_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_escaped.txt"
   192→    z_steps_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_steps.json"
   193→
   194→    test -f "${z_script_path}" || buc_die "Step script not found: ${z_script_path}"
   195→
   196→    buc_log_args "Reading script body for ${z_id} (skip shebang, comments pass through)"
   197→    tail -n +2 "${z_script_path}" > "${z_body_file}" || buc_die "Failed to read step script: ${z_script_path}"
   198→    z_body=$(<"${z_body_file}")
   199→    test -n "${z_body}" || buc_die "Empty script body: ${z_script_path}"
   200→
   201→    buc_log_args "Baking pinned image refs into script text (GCB containers lack RBRR vars)"
   202→    z_body="${z_body//\$\{RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF\}/${RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF}}"
   203→    z_body="${z_body//\$\{RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF\}/${RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF}}"
   204→
   205→    buc_log_args "Escaping dollars for Cloud Build, preserving RBGY substitutions"
   206→    printf '%s' "${z_body}" | sed 's/\$/\$\$/g; s/\$\${_RBGY_/${_RBGY_/g' \
   207→      > "${z_escaped_file}" || buc_die "Failed to escape script body for ${z_id}"
   208→
   209→    case "${z_entrypoint}" in
   210→      bash) z_arg_flag="-lc" ;;
   211→      sh)   z_arg_flag="-c" ;;
   212→      *)    buc_die "Unknown entrypoint: ${z_entrypoint}" ;;
   213→    esac
   214→
   215→    buc_log_args "Appending step ${z_id} to JSON array"
   216→    jq \
   217→      --arg name "${z_builder}" \
   218→      --arg id "${z_id}" \
   219→      --arg ep "${z_entrypoint}" \
   220→      --arg flag "${z_arg_flag}" \
   221→      --rawfile script "${z_escaped_file}" \
   222→      '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, entrypoint: $ep, args: [$flag, $script]}]' \
   223→      "${z_accumulator_file}" > "${z_steps_file}" \
   224→      || buc_die "Failed to append step ${z_id} to JSON"
   225→    mv "${z_steps_file}" "${z_accumulator_file}" \
   226→      || buc_die "Failed to update steps JSON for ${z_id}"
   227→  done
   228→
   229→  buc_log_args "Writing final stitched build structure"
   230→  jq '{steps: .}' "${z_accumulator_file}" > "${ZRBF_STITCHED_BUILD_FILE}" \
   231→    || buc_die "Failed to write stitched build JSON"
   232→
   233→  buc_log_args "Stitched ${#z_step_defs[@]} steps to ${ZRBF_STITCHED_BUILD_FILE}"
   234→}

   276→zrbf_verify_git_clean() {
   277→  zrbf_sentinel
   278→
   279→  buc_step "Verifying git repository state"
   280→
   281→  buc_log_args 'Check for uncommitted changes'
   282→  git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- || buc_die "Uncommitted changes detected - commit or stash first"
   283→
   284→  buc_log_args 'Check for untracked files'
   285→  git ls-files --others --exclude-standard > "${ZRBF_GIT_UNTRACKED_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to check untracked files"
   286→  local z_untracked=""
   287→  z_untracked=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_UNTRACKED_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read untracked list"
   288→  test -z "${z_untracked}" || buc_die "Untracked files present - commit or clean first"
   289→
   290→  buc_log_args 'Check if all commits are pushed'
   291→  git fetch --quiet || buc_die "git fetch failed"
   292→  git rev-list @{u}..HEAD --count > "${ZRBF_GIT_UNTRACKED_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || echo "0" > "${ZRBF_GIT_UNTRACKED_FILE}"
   293→  local z_unpushed=""
   294→  z_unpushed=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_UNTRACKED_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read ahead count"
   295→  test "${z_unpushed}" -eq 0 || buc_die "Local commits not pushed (${z_unpushed} commits ahead)"
   296→
   297→  buc_log_args 'Get git metadata'
   298→  git rev-parse HEAD              > "${ZRBF_GIT_COMMIT_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to get commit SHA"
   299→  git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD > "${ZRBF_GIT_BRANCH_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to get branch name"
   300→
   301→  buc_log_args 'Get first available remote'
   302→  git remote | head -1 > "${ZRBF_GIT_REMOTE_FILE}" || buc_die "No git remotes configured"
   303→  local z_remote=""
   304→  z_remote=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_REMOTE_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read remote name"
   305→  test -n "${z_remote}" || buc_die "No git remotes found"
   306→
   307→  buc_log_args 'Get repo URL from remote: ${z_remote}'
   308→  git config --get "remote.${z_remote}.url" > "${ZRBF_GIT_REPO_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to get repo URL"
   309→
   310→  local z_commit=""
   311→  local z_branch=""
   312→  local z_repo_url=""
   313→  z_commit=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_COMMIT_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read commit"
   314→  z_branch=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_BRANCH_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read branch"
   315→  z_repo_url=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_REPO_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read repo url"
   316→
   317→  test -n "${z_commit}"   || buc_die "Git commit is empty"
   318→  test -n "${z_branch}"   || buc_die "Git branch is empty"
   319→  test -n "${z_repo_url}" || buc_die "Git repo URL is empty"
   320→
   321→  buc_log_args 'Extract owner/repo from URL (handles both HTTPS and SSH)'
   322→  # Example HTTPS: https://github.com/owner/repo.git
   323→  # Example SSH  : git@github.com:owner/repo.git
   324→  local z_repo="${z_repo_url#*github.com[:/]}"
   325→  z_repo="${z_repo%.git}"
   326→
   327→  buc_log_args 'Write git info JSON'
   328→  jq -n                        \
   329→    --arg commit "${z_commit}" \
   330→    --arg branch "${z_branch}" \
   331→    --arg repo   "${z_repo}"   \
   332→    '{"commit": $commit, "branch": $branch, "repo": $repo}' \
   333→    > "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to write git info"
   334→
   335→  buc_info "Git state clean - commit: ${z_commit:0:8} on ${z_branch}"
   336→}

   338→zrbf_package_context() {
   339→  zrbf_sentinel
   340→
   341→  local z_dockerfile="$1"
   342→  local z_context_dir="$2"
   343→
   344→  buc_step 'Packaging build context (source only, no build config)'
   345→
   346→  buc_log_args 'Create temp directory for context'
   347→  rm -rf "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}" || buc_warn "Failed to clean existing staging directory"
   348→  mkdir -p "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}" || buc_die "Failed to create staging directory"
   349→
   350→  buc_log_args 'Copy context to staging'
   351→  cp -r "${z_context_dir}/." "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}/" || buc_die "Failed to copy context"
   352→
   353→  buc_log_args 'Copy Dockerfile to context root if not already there'
   354→  local z_dockerfile_name="${z_dockerfile##*/}"
   355→  cp "${z_dockerfile}" "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}/${z_dockerfile_name}" || buc_die "Failed to copy Dockerfile"
   356→
   357→  buc_log_args "Create tarball"
   358→  tar -czf "${ZRBF_BUILD_CONTEXT_TAR}" -C "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}" . || buc_die "Failed to create context archive"
   359→
   360→  buc_log_args "Clean up staging"
   361→  rm -rf "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}" || buc_warn "Failed to cleanup staging directory"
   362→
   363→  buc_log_args 'Compute archive size (bytes) using temp file'
   364→  wc -c < "${ZRBF_BUILD_CONTEXT_TAR}" > "${ZRBF_CONTEXT_SIZE_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to compute context size"
   365→  local z_size_bytes=""
   366→  z_size_bytes=$(<"${ZRBF_CONTEXT_SIZE_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read context size"
   367→  test -n "${z_size_bytes}" || buc_die "Context size is empty"
   368→
   369→  # Size policy: warn >1MB; die >10MB
   370→  if test "${z_size_bytes}" -gt 10485760; then
   371→    buc_die  "Context tarball too large: ${z_size_bytes} bytes (>10MB limit)"
   372→  elif test "${z_size_bytes}" -gt 1048576; then
   373→    buc_warn "Context tarball large: ${z_size_bytes} bytes (>1MB warning)"
   374→  fi
   375→
   376→  buc_info "Build context packaged: ${z_size_bytes} bytes"
   377→}

   438→zrbf_compose_build_request_json() {
   439→  zrbf_sentinel
   440→
   441→  # Stitch step scripts into build JSON
   442→  zrbf_stitch_build_json
   443→
   444→  jq empty "${ZRBF_BUILD_CONFIG_FILE}"    || buc_die "Build config is not valid JSON"
   445→  jq empty "${ZRBF_STITCHED_BUILD_FILE}"  || buc_die "Stitched build file is not valid JSON"
   446→
   447→  local z_obj_name=""
   448→  z_obj_name=$(<"${ZRBF_TARBALL_NAME_FILE}") || buc_die "Missing tarball name"
   449→
   450→  # Merge steps from stitched build JSON with runtime substitutions and config
   451→  # Service account must be in projects/{project}/serviceAccounts/{email} format
   452→  local z_sa_resource="projects/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}"
   453→  jq -n \
   454→    --slurpfile sub   "${ZRBF_BUILD_CONFIG_FILE}"    \
   455→    --slurpfile build "${ZRBF_STITCHED_BUILD_FILE}"  \
   456→    --arg bucket "${RBGD_GCS_BUCKET}"                \
   457→    --arg object "${z_obj_name}"                     \
   458→    --arg sa     "${z_sa_resource}"                  \
   459→    --arg mtype  "${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}"          \
   460→    --arg to     "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}"               \
   461→    '{
   462→      source: { storageSource: { bucket: $bucket, object: $object } },
   463→      steps: $build[0].steps,
   464→      substitutions: ($sub[0].substitutions),
   465→      options: { logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY", machineType: $mtype },
   466→      serviceAccount: $sa,
   467→      timeout: $to
   468→    }' > "${ZRBF_BUILD_REQUEST_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to compose build request json"
   469→}

   471→zrbf_submit_build_json() {
   472→  zrbf_sentinel
   473→  buc_step 'Submitting build (JSON) to Google Cloud Build'
   474→
   475→  local z_token=""
   476→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get GCB OAuth token"
   477→
   478→  curl -sS -X POST                              \
   479→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"       \
   480→    -H "Content-Type: application/json"         \
   481→    -H "Accept: application/json"               \
   482→    --data-binary @"${ZRBF_BUILD_REQUEST_FILE}" \
   483→    -o "${ZRBF_BUILD_RESPONSE_FILE}"            \
   484→    -w "%{http_code}"                           \
   485→    "${ZRBF_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}" > "${ZRBF_BUILD_HTTP_CODE}" || buc_die "Build create request failed"
   486→
   487→  local z_http=""
   488→  z_http=$(<"${ZRBF_BUILD_HTTP_CODE}") || buc_die "No HTTP status from Cloud Build create"
   489→  test "${z_http}" = "200" -o "${z_http}" = "201" || buc_die "Cloud Build create failed (HTTP ${z_http})"
   490→  test -s "${ZRBF_BUILD_RESPONSE_FILE}" || buc_die "Empty Cloud Build response"
   491→
   492→  # Accept Operation or Build; prefer metadata.build.id else .id
   493→  local z_build_id=""
   494→  z_build_id=$(jq -r '(.metadata.build.id // .id // empty)' "${ZRBF_BUILD_RESPONSE_FILE}") || z_build_id=""
   495→  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build id not found in response"
   496→  echo "${z_build_id}" > "${ZRBF_BUILD_ID_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to persist build id"
   497→
   498→  local z_console_url="${ZRBF_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE};region=${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/${z_build_id}?project=${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}"
   499→  buc_info "Build submitted: ${z_build_id}"
   500→  buc_link "Click to " "Open build in Cloud Console" "${z_console_url}"
   501→}

   510→zrbf_wait_build_completion() {
   511→  zrbf_sentinel
   512→
   513→  buc_step 'Waiting for build completion'
   514→
   515→  local z_build_id=""
   516→  z_build_id=$(<"${ZRBF_BUILD_ID_FILE}") || buc_die "No build ID found"
   517→  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build ID file empty"
   518→
   519→  buc_log_args 'Get fresh token for polling'
   520→  local z_token=""
   521→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get GCB OAuth token"
   522→
   523→  local z_status="PENDING"
   524→  local z_attempts=0
   525→  local z_max_attempts=960  # 80 minutes with 5 second intervals
   526→
   527→  while true; do
   528→    case "${z_status}" in PENDING|QUEUED|WORKING) : ;; *) break;; esac
   529→    sleep 5
   530→
   531→    z_attempts=$((z_attempts + 1))
   532→    test ${z_attempts} -le ${z_max_attempts} || buc_die "Build timeout after ${z_max_attempts} attempts"
   533→
   534→    buc_log_args "Fetch build status (attempt ${z_attempts}/${z_max_attempts})"
   535→    curl -s                                                \
   536→         -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
   537→         "${ZRBF_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}/${z_build_id}"    \
   538→         > "${ZRBF_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}"                     \
   539→      || buc_die "Failed to get build status"
   540→
   541→    test -f "${ZRBF_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}" || buc_die "Build status file not created"
   542→    test -s "${ZRBF_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}" || buc_die "Build status file is empty"
   543→
   544→    jq -r '.status' "${ZRBF_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}" > "${ZRBF_STATUS_CHECK_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to extract status"
   545→    z_status=$(<"${ZRBF_STATUS_CHECK_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read status"
   546→    test -n "${z_status}" || buc_die "Status is empty"
   547→
   548→    buc_info "Build status: ${z_status} (attempt ${z_attempts}/${z_max_attempts})"
   549→  done
   550→
   551→  test "${z_status}" = "SUCCESS" || buc_die "Build failed with status: ${z_status}"
   552→
   553→  buc_success 'Build completed successfully'
   554→}

   559→rbf_build() {
   560→  zrbf_sentinel
   561→
   562→  local z_vessel_dir="${1:-}"
   563→
   564→  # Documentation block
   565→  buc_doc_brief "Build container image from vessel using Google Cloud Build"
   566→  buc_doc_param "vessel_dir" "Path to vessel directory containing rbrv.env"
   567→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   568→
   569→  buc_log_args "Validate parameters"
   570→  test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "Vessel directory required"
   571→
   572→  # Load and validate vessel
   573→  zrbf_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"
   574→
   575→  buc_log_args "Verify vessel has conjuring configuration"
   576→  test -n "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE:-}" || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' is not configured for conjuring (no RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE)"
   577→  test -n "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT:-}" || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' is not configured for conjuring (no RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT)"
   578→
   579→  buc_log_args "Resolve paths from vessel configuration"
   580→  test -f "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}" || buc_die "Dockerfile not found: ${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}"
   581→  test -d "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}" || buc_die "Build context not found: ${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}"
   582→
   583→  buc_log_args "Enforce vessel binfmt policy"
   584→  if test "${RBRV_CONJURE_BINFMT_POLICY}" = "forbid"; then
   585→    local z_native="$(uname -s | tr A-Z a-z)/$(uname -m)"
   586→    case " ${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS} " in
   587→      *"${z_native}"*) : ;;  # native arch allowed
   588→      *) buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' forbids binfmt but RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS='${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS}'" ;;
   589→    esac
   590→  fi
   591→
   592→  buc_log_args "Generate build tag using vessel sigil"
   593→  local z_tag="${RBRV_SIGIL}.${BURD_NOW_STAMP}"
   594→
   595→  buc_info "Building vessel image: ${RBRV_SIGIL} -> ${z_tag}"
   596→
   597→  # Verify GCB quota headroom before expensive packaging
   598→  buc_log_args "Check GCB quota headroom"
   599→  local z_quota_token=""
   600→  z_quota_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
   601→    || buc_die "Failed to get token for GCB quota check"
   602→  rbgd_check_gcb_quota "${z_quota_token}"
   603→
   604→  # Verify git state + capture metadata
   605→  zrbf_verify_git_clean
   606→
   607→  # Package build context (source code only; build config inlined in API request)
   608→  zrbf_package_context "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}" "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}"
   609→
   610→  # Prepare build substitutions (variable names kept as _RBGY_* for template compatibility)
   611→  local z_dockerfile_name="${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE##*/}"
   612→
   613→  buc_log_args 'Read git info from file'
   614→  jq -r '.commit' "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${ZRBF_GIT_COMMIT_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to extract git commit"
   615→  jq -r '.branch' "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${ZRBF_GIT_BRANCH_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to extract git branch"
   616→  jq -r '.repo'   "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${ZRBF_GIT_REPO_FILE}"   || buc_die "Failed to extract git repo"
   617→
   618→  local z_git_commit=""
   619→  local z_git_branch=""
   620→  local z_git_repo=""
   621→  z_git_commit=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_COMMIT_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read git commit"
   622→  z_git_branch=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_BRANCH_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read git branch"
   623→  z_git_repo=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_REPO_FILE}")     || buc_die "Failed to read git repo"
   624→

   639→    --arg zjq_git_commit     "${z_git_commit}"                  \
   640→    --arg zjq_git_branch     "${z_git_branch}"                  \
   641→    --arg zjq_git_repo       "${z_git_repo}"                    \
   642→    --arg zjq_gar_host_suffix  "${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"         \

   646→      substitutions: {
   647→        _RBGY_DOCKERFILE:     $zjq_dockerfile,
   648→        _RBGY_MONIKER:        $zjq_moniker,
   649→        _RBGY_PLATFORMS:      $zjq_platforms,
   650→        _RBGY_GAR_LOCATION:   $zjq_gar_location,
   651→        _RBGY_GAR_PROJECT:    $zjq_gar_project,
   652→        _RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY: $zjq_gar_repository,
   653→        _RBGY_GIT_COMMIT:     $zjq_git_commit,
   654→        _RBGY_GIT_BRANCH:     $zjq_git_branch,
   655→        _RBGY_GIT_REPO:       $zjq_git_repo,
   656→        _RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX:   $zjq_gar_host_suffix,
   657→        _RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE:  $zjq_ark_suffix_image,
   658→        _RBGY_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT:  $zjq_ark_suffix_about
   659→      }
   660→    }' >  "${ZRBF_BUILD_CONFIG_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to create build config"
   661→
   662→  # Stage & submit new flow
   663→  zrbf_compose_tarball_name
   664→  zrbf_upload_context_to_gcs
   665→  zrbf_compose_build_request_json
   666→  zrbf_submit_build_json

   669→  zrbf_wait_build_completion
   670→
   671→  buc_success "Vessel image built: ${z_tag}"

   704→rbf_delete() {
   705→  zrbf_sentinel
   706→
   707→  local z_locator="${1:-}"
   708→  local z_force="${2:-}"
   709→
   710→  # Documentation block
   711→  buc_doc_brief "Delete an image tag from the registry by locator"
   712→  buc_doc_param "locator" "Image locator in moniker:tag format (e.g., rbev-busybox:20251231T160211Z-img)"
   713→  buc_doc_param "--force" "Optional: skip confirmation prompt"
   714→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   715→
   716→  # Validate locator parameter
   717→  test -n "${z_locator}" || buc_die "Locator parameter required (moniker:tag)"
   718→
   719→  # Parse locator into moniker and tag
   720→  case "${z_locator}" in
   721→    *:*) : ;;
   722→    *)   buc_die "Invalid locator format. Expected moniker:tag" ;;
   723→  esac
   724→  local z_moniker="${z_locator%%:*}"
   725→  local z_tag="${z_locator#*:}"
   726→  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "Moniker is empty in locator"
   727→  test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag is empty in locator"
   728→
   729→  # Check for --force flag
   730→  local z_skip_confirm=false
   731→  if test "${z_force}" = "--force"; then
   732→    z_skip_confirm=true
   733→  fi
   734→
   735→  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
   736→
   737→  # Get OAuth token using Director credentials
   738→  local z_token
   739→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
   740→
   741→  # Confirm deletion unless --force
   742→  if test "${z_skip_confirm}" = "false"; then
   743→    buc_require "Will delete: ${z_locator}" "yes"
   744→  fi
   745→
   746→  buc_step "Deleting: ${z_locator}"
   747→
   748→  # Delete by tag reference
   749→  local z_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}status.txt"
   750→  local z_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}response.json"
   751→
   752→  curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
   753→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
   754→    -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
   755→    -o "${z_response_file}"                           \
   756→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_moniker}/manifests/${z_tag}" \
   757→    > "${z_status_file}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed"
   758→
   759→  local z_http_code
   760→  z_http_code=$(<"${z_status_file}")
   761→  test -n "${z_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty"
   762→
   763→  if test "${z_http_code}" != "202" && test "${z_http_code}" != "204"; then
   764→    buc_warn "Response body: $(cat "${z_response_file}" 2>/dev/null || echo 'empty')"
   765→    buc_die "Delete failed with HTTP ${z_http_code}"
   766→  fi
   767→
   768→  buc_success "Deleted or nonexistent: ${z_locator}"
   769→}

   771→rbf_list() {
   772→  zrbf_sentinel
   773→
   774→  # Documentation block
   775→  buc_doc_brief "List all locators (moniker:tag) in the Artifact Registry repository"
   776→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   777→
   778→  # Note: Ideally uses Retriever role, but Director also has read access
   779→  buc_step "Fetching OAuth token (Director)"
   780→  local z_token
   781→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
   782→
   783→  buc_step "Listing all images in repository"
   784→
   785→  local z_packages_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_list_packages.json"
   786→  local z_gar_api="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com/v1"
   787→  local z_repo_path="projects/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}/repositories/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
   788→
   789→  curl -sL \
   790→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
   791→    "${z_gar_api}/${z_repo_path}/packages" \
   792→    > "${z_packages_file}" || buc_die "Failed to fetch packages"
   793→
   794→  # Check for error response
   795→  if jq -e '.error' "${z_packages_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   796→    local z_error
   797→    z_error=$(jq -r '.error.message // "Unknown error"' "${z_packages_file}")
   798→    buc_die "API error: ${z_error}"
   799→  fi
   800→
   801→  # Extract package monikers
   802→  local z_packages_list="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_list_packages.txt"
   803→  jq -r '.packages[]?.name // empty' "${z_packages_file}" | while read -r pkg; do
   804→    echo "${pkg##*/}"
   805→  done | sort > "${z_packages_list}"
   806→
   807→  echo "Repository: ${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBF_REGISTRY_PATH}"

   809→  # For each moniker, fetch tags and emit locators
   810→  while IFS= read -r z_moniker; do
   811→    local z_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_list_tags_${z_moniker}.json"
   812→    curl -sL \
   813→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
   814→      "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_moniker}/tags/list" \
   815→      > "${z_tags_file}" 2>/dev/null || continue
   816→
   817→    # Skip if error response
   818→    if jq -e '.errors' "${z_tags_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   819→      continue
   820→    fi
   821→
   822→    # Emit locators: moniker:tag
   823→    jq -r '.tags[]? // empty' "${z_tags_file}" | sort | while read -r z_tag; do
   824→      echo "${z_moniker}:${z_tag}"
   825→    done
   826→  done < "${z_packages_list}"
   827→
   828→  buc_success "List complete"
   829→}

   831→rbf_beseech() {
   832→  zrbf_sentinel
   833→
   834→  # Documentation block
   835→  buc_doc_brief "Petition registry to reveal consecrated arks, correlating artifact pairs by shared consecration timestamp"
   836→  buc_doc_param "<vessel>" "Optional vessel filter - show only arks for this vessel"
   837→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   838→
   839→  # Optional vessel filter (strip path prefix — accept directory path or bare moniker)
   840→  local z_filter_vessel="${1:-}"
   841→  z_filter_vessel="${z_filter_vessel##*/}"
   842→
   843→  buc_step "Fetching OAuth token (Director)"
   844→  local z_token
   845→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
   846→
   847→  buc_step "Enumerating arks from repository"
   848→
   849→  local z_packages_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_beseech_packages.json"
   850→  local z_gar_api="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com/v1"
   851→  local z_repo_path="projects/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}/repositories/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
   852→
   853→  curl -sL \
   854→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
   855→    "${z_gar_api}/${z_repo_path}/packages" \
   856→    > "${z_packages_file}" || buc_die "Failed to fetch packages"
   857→
   858→  # Check for error response
   859→  if jq -e '.error' "${z_packages_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   860→    local z_error
   861→    z_error=$(jq -r '.error.message // "Unknown error"' "${z_packages_file}")
   862→    buc_die "API error: ${z_error}"
   863→  fi
   864→
   865→  # Extract package monikers, optionally filter
   866→  local z_packages_list="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_beseech_packages.txt"
   867→  if [[ -n "${z_filter_vessel}" ]]; then
   868→    jq -r '.packages[]?.name // empty' "${z_packages_file}" | while read -r pkg; do
   869→      local moniker="${pkg##*/}"
   870→      if [[ "${moniker}" == "${z_filter_vessel}" ]]; then
   871→        echo "${moniker}"
   872→      fi
   873→    done | sort > "${z_packages_list}"
   874→  else
   875→    jq -r '.packages[]?.name // empty' "${z_packages_file}" | while read -r pkg; do
   876→      echo "${pkg##*/}"
   877→    done | sort > "${z_packages_list}"
   878→  fi
   879→
   880→  # Build ark correlation data
   881→  local z_arks_raw="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_beseech_arks_raw.txt"
   882→  > "${z_arks_raw}"  # Clear file
   883→
   884→  while IFS= read -r z_moniker; do
   885→    local z_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_beseech_tags_${z_moniker}.json"
   886→    curl -sL \
   887→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
   888→      "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_moniker}/tags/list" \
   889→      > "${z_tags_file}" 2>/dev/null || continue
   890→
   891→    # Skip if error response
   892→    if jq -e '.errors' "${z_tags_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   893→      continue
   894→    fi
   895→
   896→    # Process tags: extract consecrations and artifact types
   897→    jq -r '.tags[]? // empty' "${z_tags_file}" | while read -r z_tag; do
   898→      # Check for -image suffix
   899→      if [[ "${z_tag}" == *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}" ]]; then
   900→        local z_consecration="${z_tag%${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}}"
   901→        echo "${z_moniker}|${z_consecration}|image"
   902→      # Check for -about suffix
   903→      elif [[ "${z_tag}" == *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}" ]]; then
   904→        local z_consecration="${z_tag%${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}}"
   905→        echo "${z_moniker}|${z_consecration}|about"
   906→      fi
   907→      # Skip tags that are neither (plain image tags)
   908→    done >> "${z_arks_raw}"
   909→  done < "${z_packages_list}"
   910→
   911→  # Correlate artifacts into arks
   912→  local z_arks_correlated="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_beseech_arks_correlated.txt"
   913→  sort "${z_arks_raw}" | awk -F'|' '
   914→    {
   915→      key = $1 "|" $2
   916→      if ($3 == "image") {
   917→        has_image[key] = 1
   918→      } else if ($3 == "about") {
   919→        has_about[key] = 1
   920→      }
   921→      seen[key] = 1
   922→    }
   923→    END {
   924→      for (k in seen) {
   925→        split(k, parts, "|")
   926→        vessel = parts[1]
   927→        consecration = parts[2]
   928→        image_mark = (has_image[k] ? "✓" : "✗")
   929→        about_mark = (has_about[k] ? "✓" : "✗")
   930→        printf "%-30s %-20s %-8s %-8s\n", vessel, consecration, image_mark, about_mark
   931→      }
   932→    }
   933→  ' | sort -k1,1 -k2,2r > "${z_arks_correlated}"
   934→
   935→  # Display header and results
   936→  printf "%-30s %-20s %-8s %-8s\n" "VESSEL" "CONSECRATION" "-image" "-about"
   937→  cat "${z_arks_correlated}"
   938→
   939→  buc_success "Beseech complete"
   940→}

  1008→rbf_summon() {
  1009→  zrbf_sentinel
  1010→
  1011→  local z_vessel="${1:-}"
  1012→  z_vessel="${z_vessel##*/}"  # strip path prefix — accept directory path or bare moniker
  1013→  local z_consecration="${2:-}"
  1014→
  1015→  # Documentation block
  1016→  buc_doc_brief "Summon an ark (pull both -image and -about artifacts as a coherent unit)"
  1017→  buc_doc_param "vessel" "Vessel name (e.g., rbev-busybox)"
  1018→  buc_doc_param "consecration" "Consecration timestamp (e.g., 20250206T120000Z)"
  1019→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
  1020→
  1021→  buc_log_args "Validate parameters"
  1022→  test -n "${z_vessel}" || buc_die "Vessel parameter required"
  1023→  test -n "${z_consecration}" || buc_die "Consecration parameter required"
  1024→
  1025→  buc_step "Authenticating for retrieval"
  1026→
  1027→  # Prefer Retriever credentials, fallback to Director
  1028→  local z_rbra_file=""
  1029→  if test -n "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE:-}" && test -f "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"; then
  1030→    z_rbra_file="${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
  1031→    buc_info "Using Retriever credentials"
  1032→  else
  1033→    z_rbra_file="${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
  1034→    buc_info "Retriever not configured, using Director credentials"
  1035→  fi
  1036→
  1037→  # Get OAuth token
  1038→  local z_token
  1039→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${z_rbra_file}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
  1040→
  1041→  # Construct ark tags
  1042→  local z_image_tag="${z_consecration}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
  1043→  local z_about_tag="${z_consecration}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}"
  1044→
  1045→  buc_step "Verifying ark existence"
  1046→
  1047→  # Check if -image artifact exists
  1048→  local z_image_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}summon_image_status.txt"
  1049→  local z_image_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}summon_image_response.json"
  1050→
  1051→  curl --head -s                                     \
  1052→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
  1053→    -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
  1054→    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
  1055→    -o "${z_image_response_file}"                   \
  1056→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_image_tag}" \
  1057→    > "${z_image_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -image artifact"
  1058→
  1059→  local z_image_http_code
  1060→  z_image_http_code=$(<"${z_image_status_file}")
  1061→  test -n "${z_image_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -image"
  1062→
  1063→  local z_image_exists=false
  1064→  if test "${z_image_http_code}" = "200"; then
  1065→    z_image_exists=true
  1066→  elif test "${z_image_http_code}" != "404"; then
  1067→    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_image_http_code} when checking -image artifact"
  1068→  fi
  1069→
  1070→  # Check if -about artifact exists
  1071→  local z_about_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}summon_about_status.txt"
  1072→  local z_about_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}summon_about_response.json"
  1073→
  1074→  curl --head -s                                     \
  1075→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
  1076→    -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
  1077→    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
  1078→    -o "${z_about_response_file}"                   \
  1079→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
  1080→    > "${z_about_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -about artifact"
  1081→
  1082→  local z_about_http_code
  1083→  z_about_http_code=$(<"${z_about_status_file}")
  1084→  test -n "${z_about_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about"
  1085→
  1086→  local z_about_exists=false
  1087→  if test "${z_about_http_code}" = "200"; then
  1088→    z_about_exists=true
  1089→  elif test "${z_about_http_code}" != "404"; then
  1090→    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_about_http_code} when checking -about artifact"
  1091→  fi
  1092→
  1093→  # Evaluate ark state
  1094→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "false" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
  1095→    buc_die "Ark not found: neither -image nor -about exists"
  1096→  fi
  1097→
  1098→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
  1099→    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: -image exists but -about is missing"
  1100→  elif test "${z_image_exists}" = "false" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1101→    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: -about exists but -image is missing"
  1102→  fi
  1103→
  1104→  buc_step "Logging into container registry"
  1105→
  1106→  # Docker login to GAR
  1107→  echo "${z_token}" | docker login -u oauth2accesstoken --password-stdin "https://${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}" \
  1108→    || buc_die "Container runtime authentication failed"
  1109→
  1110→  # Pull -image artifact if exists
  1111→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true"; then
  1112→    buc_step "Pulling -image artifact"
  1113→
  1114→    local z_image_ref="${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBF_REGISTRY_PATH}/${z_vessel}:${z_image_tag}"
  1115→    docker pull "${z_image_ref}" || buc_die "Failed to pull -image artifact"
  1116→    buc_info "Retrieved: ${z_image_ref}"
  1117→  fi
  1118→
  1119→  # Pull -about artifact if exists
  1120→  if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1121→    buc_step "Pulling -about artifact"
  1122→
  1123→    local z_about_ref="${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBF_REGISTRY_PATH}/${z_vessel}:${z_about_tag}"
  1124→    docker pull "${z_about_ref}" || buc_die "Failed to pull -about artifact"
  1125→    buc_info "Retrieved: ${z_about_ref}"
  1126→  fi
  1127→
  1128→  # Display results
  1129→  echo ""
  1130→  buc_success "Ark summoned: ${z_vessel}/${z_consecration}"
  1131→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true"; then
  1132→    echo "  - ${z_vessel}:${z_image_tag} retrieved"
  1133→  fi
  1134→  if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1135→    echo "  - ${z_vessel}:${z_about_tag} retrieved"
  1136→  fi
  1137→}

  1139→rbf_abjure() {
  1140→  zrbf_sentinel
  1141→
  1142→  local z_vessel="${1:-}"
  1143→  z_vessel="${z_vessel##*/}"  # strip path prefix — accept directory path or bare moniker
  1144→  local z_consecration="${2:-}"
  1145→  local z_force="${3:-}"
  1146→
  1147→  # Documentation block
  1148→  buc_doc_brief "Abjure an ark (delete both -image and -about artifacts as a coherent unit)"
  1149→  buc_doc_param "vessel" "Vessel name (e.g., rbev-busybox)"
  1150→  buc_doc_param "consecration" "Consecration timestamp (e.g., 20250206T120000Z)"
  1151→  buc_doc_param "--force" "Optional: skip confirmation prompt"
  1152→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
  1153→
  1154→  # Validate parameters
  1155→  test -n "${z_vessel}" || buc_die "Vessel parameter required"
  1156→  test -n "${z_consecration}" || buc_die "Consecration parameter required"
  1157→
  1158→  # Check for --force flag in remaining arguments
  1159→  local z_skip_confirm=false
  1160→  if test "${z_force}" = "--force"; then
  1161→    z_skip_confirm=true
  1162→  fi
  1163→
  1164→  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
  1165→
  1166→  # Get OAuth token using Director credentials
  1167→  local z_token
  1168→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
  1169→
  1170→  # Construct ark tags
  1171→  local z_image_tag="${z_consecration}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
  1172→  local z_about_tag="${z_consecration}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}"
  1173→
  1174→  buc_step "Verifying ark existence"
  1175→
  1176→  # Check if -image artifact exists
  1177→  local z_image_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}image_status.txt"
  1178→  local z_image_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}image_response.json"
  1179→
  1180→  curl --head -s                                     \
  1181→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
  1182→    -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
  1183→    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
  1184→    -o "${z_image_response_file}"                   \
  1185→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_image_tag}" \
  1186→    > "${z_image_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -image artifact"
  1187→
  1188→  local z_image_http_code
  1189→  z_image_http_code=$(<"${z_image_status_file}")
  1190→  test -n "${z_image_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -image"
  1191→
  1192→  local z_image_exists=false
  1193→  if test "${z_image_http_code}" = "200"; then
  1194→    z_image_exists=true
  1195→  elif test "${z_image_http_code}" != "404"; then
  1196→    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_image_http_code} when checking -image artifact"
  1197→  fi
  1198→
  1199→  # Check if -about artifact exists
  1200→  local z_about_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}about_status.txt"
  1201→  local z_about_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}about_response.json"
  1202→
  1203→  curl --head -s                                     \
  1204→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
  1205→    -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
  1206→    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
  1207→    -o "${z_about_response_file}"                   \
  1208→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
  1209→    > "${z_about_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -about artifact"
  1210→
  1211→  local z_about_http_code
  1212→  z_about_http_code=$(<"${z_about_status_file}")
  1213→  test -n "${z_about_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about"
  1214→
  1215→  local z_about_exists=false
  1216→  if test "${z_about_http_code}" = "200"; then
  1217→    z_about_exists=true
  1218→  elif test "${z_about_http_code}" != "404"; then
  1219→    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_about_http_code} when checking -about artifact"
  1220→  fi
  1221→
  1222→  # Evaluate ark state
  1223→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "false" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
  1224→    buc_die "Ark not found: neither -image nor -about exists"
  1225→  fi
  1226→
  1227→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
  1228→    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: -image exists but -about is missing"
  1229→  elif test "${z_image_exists}" = "false" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1230→    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: -about exists but -image is missing"
  1231→  fi
  1232→
  1233→  # Confirm abjuration unless --force
  1234→  if test "${z_skip_confirm}" = "false"; then
  1235→    local z_confirm_msg="Will abjure ark ${z_vessel}/${z_consecration}:"
  1236→    if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true"; then
  1237→      z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${z_vessel}:${z_image_tag}"
  1238→    fi
  1239→    if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1240→      z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${z_vessel}:${z_about_tag}"
  1241→    fi
  1242→    buc_require "${z_confirm_msg}" "yes"
  1243→  fi
  1244→
  1245→  # Delete -image artifact if exists
  1246→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true"; then
  1247→    buc_step "Deleting -image artifact"
  1248→
  1249→    local z_delete_image_status="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_image_status.txt"
  1250→    local z_delete_image_response="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_image_response.json"
  1251→
  1252→    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
  1253→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
  1254→      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
  1255→      -o "${z_delete_image_response}"                   \
  1256→      "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_image_tag}" \
  1257→      > "${z_delete_image_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for -image"
  1258→
  1259→    local z_delete_image_code
  1260→    z_delete_image_code=$(<"${z_delete_image_status}")
  1261→    test -n "${z_delete_image_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -image delete"
  1262→
  1263→    if test "${z_delete_image_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_image_code}" != "204"; then
  1264→      buc_warn "Response body: $(cat "${z_delete_image_response}" 2>/dev/null || echo 'empty')"
  1265→      buc_die "Failed to delete -image artifact (HTTP ${z_delete_image_code})"
  1266→    fi
  1267→
  1268→    buc_info "Deleted: ${z_vessel}:${z_image_tag}"
  1269→  fi
  1270→
  1271→  # Delete -about artifact if exists
  1272→  if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1273→    buc_step "Deleting -about artifact"
  1274→
  1275→    local z_delete_about_status="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_about_status.txt"
  1276→    local z_delete_about_response="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_about_response.json"
  1277→
  1278→    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
  1279→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
  1280→      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
  1281→      -o "${z_delete_about_response}"                   \
  1282→      "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
  1283→      > "${z_delete_about_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for -about"
  1284→
  1285→    local z_delete_about_code
  1286→    z_delete_about_code=$(<"${z_delete_about_status}")
  1287→    test -n "${z_delete_about_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about delete"
  1288→
  1289→    if test "${z_delete_about_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_about_code}" != "204"; then
  1290→      buc_warn "Response body: $(cat "${z_delete_about_response}" 2>/dev/null || echo 'empty')"
  1291→      buc_die "Failed to delete -about artifact (HTTP ${z_delete_about_code})"
  1292→    fi
  1293→
  1294→    buc_info "Deleted: ${z_vessel}:${z_about_tag}"
  1295→  fi
  1296→
  1297→  # Display results
  1298→  echo ""
  1299→  buc_success "Ark abjured: ${z_vessel}/${z_consecration}"
  1300→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true"; then
  1301→    echo "  - ${z_vessel}:${z_image_tag} deleted"
  1302→  fi
  1303→  if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1304→    echo "  - ${z_vessel}:${z_about_tag} deleted"
  1305→  fi
  1306→}

    77→# Service Account Configuration - RBRA (Recipe Bottle Regime Auth) Format
    78→#
    79→# RBRA files are bash-sourceable environment files containing extracted 
    80→# Google service account credentials. No JSON parsing required at runtime.
    81→#
    82→# Required RBRA environment variables:
    83→#   RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL       - Service account email (e.g., sa-name@project.iam.gserviceaccount.com)
    84→#   RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY        - RSA private key in PEM format (includes newlines as \n)
    85→#   RBRA_PROJECT_ID         - GCP project ID for context
    86→#   RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC - OAuth token lifetime in seconds (300-3600)
    87→#
    88→# Security notes:
    89→#   - RBRA files contain raw credentials - protect like passwords
    90→#   - Never commit RBRA files to version control
    91→#   - Use shortest reasonable TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC for each role
    92→#

    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    24→
    25→# Source dependencies
    26→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buc_command.sh"

    33→# CLI Functions
    34→
    35→zrbrr_cli_kindle() {
    36→  test -z "${ZRBRR_CLI_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "RBRR CLI already kindled"
    37→
    38→  # GCB runs on linux/amd64 — pin digests must match this platform
    39→  ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_OS="linux"
    40→  ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_ARCH="amd64"
    41→
    42→  ZRBRR_CLI_KINDLED=1
    43→}
    44→
    45→# Command: validate - source file and validate (dies on first error)
    46→rbrr_validate() {
    47→  local z_file="${1:-}"
    48→  test -n "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_validate: file argument required"
    49→  test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_validate: file not found: ${z_file}"
    50→
    51→  buc_step "Validating RBRR repo regime file: ${z_file}"
    52→
    53→  # Use rbrr_load for standardized loading
    54→  rbrr_load
    55→
    56→  buc_step "RBRR repo regime valid"
    57→}
    58→
    59→# Command: render - diagnostic display then validate
    60→rbrr_render() {
    61→  local z_file="${1:-}"
    62→  test -n "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_render: file argument required"
    63→  test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_render: file not found: ${z_file}"
    64→
    65→  # Source and kindle (no dying — show all fields before validation)
    66→  source "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_render: failed to source ${z_file}"
    67→  zrbrr_kindle
    68→  zrbcr_kindle
    69→
    70→  # Display header
    71→  echo ""
    72→  echo "${ZBUC_WHITE}RBRR - Recipe Bottle Regime Repo${ZBUC_RESET}"
    73→  echo "${ZBUC_WHITE}File: ${z_file}${ZBUC_RESET}"
    74→  echo ""
    75→
    76→  # Vessel and Local Configuration
    77→  rbcr_section_begin "Vessel and Local Configuration"
    78→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_VESSEL_DIR              string  req  "Vessel definitions directory"
    79→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_DNS_SERVER              ipv4    req  "DNS server for containers"
    80→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME     xname   req  "Podman machine for ignite operations"
    81→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME     xname   req  "Podman machine for deploy operations"
    82→  rbcr_section_end
    83→
    84→  # Build Tool Configuration
    85→  rbcr_section_begin "Build Tool Configuration"
    86→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ            string  req  "Crane binary archive path"
    87→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS      string  req  "Target platforms for manifests"
    88→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION   string  req  "Podman version (semantic version)"
    89→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN   fqin    req  "VM image origin reference"
    90→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY         string  req  "Identity for operations"
    91→  rbcr_section_end
    92→
    93→  # GCP Infrastructure
    94→  rbcr_section_begin "GCP Infrastructure"
    95→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID        gname   req  "GCP project ID for depot"
    96→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCP_REGION              gname   req  "GCP region"
    97→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY          gname   req  "Google Artifact Registry repository name"
    98→  rbcr_section_end
    99→
   100→  # Google Cloud Build Configuration
   101→  rbcr_section_begin "Google Cloud Build Configuration"
   102→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE        string  req  "Machine type for Cloud Build"
   103→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT             string  req  "Build timeout (e.g., 1200s)"
   104→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS decimal req "Min concurrent builds required"
   105→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "gcrane image reference (digest-pinned)"
   106→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF      odref   req  "oras image reference (digest-pinned)"
   107→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "gcloud image reference (digest-pinned)"
   108→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "docker image reference (digest-pinned)"
   109→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "skopeo image reference (digest-pinned)"
   110→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "alpine image reference (digest-pinned)"
   111→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF      odref   req  "syft image reference (digest-pinned)"
   112→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "binfmt image reference (digest-pinned)"
   113→  rbcr_section_end
   114→
   115→  # Service Account Configuration
   116→  rbcr_section_begin "Service Account Configuration"
   117→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE      string  req  "Governor service account key file"

   119→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE      string  req  "Director service account key file"
   120→  rbcr_section_end
   121→
   122→  # Unexpected variables (from kindle, not gated)
   123→  if test ${#ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED[@]} -gt 0; then
   124→    echo "${ZBUC_RED}Unexpected RBRR_ variables:${ZBUC_RESET}"
   125→    local z_var
   126→    for z_var in "${ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED[@]}"; do
   127→      printf "  ${ZBUC_RED}%-30s${ZBUC_RESET} = %s\n" "${z_var}" "${!z_var:-}"
   128→    done
   129→    echo ""
   130→  fi
   131→
   132→  # Validate (dies on first error, after full display)
   133→  zrbrr_validate_fields
   134→  echo "${ZBUC_GREEN}RBRR repo regime valid${ZBUC_RESET}"

   137→# Command: refresh_gcb_pins - resolve image tags to digests and update RBRR file
   138→# Every step must succeed or the function dies — no partial updates.
   139→# Requires: docker, jq, curl, RBCC_RBRR_FILE set, BURD_NOW_STAMP set, BURD_TEMP_DIR set
   140→rbrr_refresh_gcb_pins() {
   141→  local z_rbrr_file="${RBCC_RBRR_FILE}"
   142→  test -f "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "RBRR config not found: ${z_rbrr_file}"
   143→  test -n "${BURD_NOW_STAMP:-}" || buc_die "BURD_NOW_STAMP not set - must be called from BURD"
   144→  test -d "${BURD_TEMP_DIR:-}" || buc_die "BURD_TEMP_DIR not set or not a directory"
   145→
   146→  buc_countdown 5 "NOTE: Docker anonymous login is heavily rate limited.  Try again in 6 hours if you see that fail.  Continuing in:"
   147→
   148→  local z_vintage="${BURD_NOW_STAMP}"
   149→  local z_oras_token_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_oras_token.json"
   150→  local z_oras_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_oras_tags.json"
   151→  local z_oras_token_value_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_oras_token_value.txt"
   152→  local z_oras_tag_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_oras_tag.txt"
   153→  local z_refresh_prefix="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_refresh_"
   154→  local z_refresh_sed_prefix="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_refresh_sed_"
   155→
   156→  # Discover latest oras stable version from GHCR API.
   157→  # oras doesn't publish a :latest tag, so we must find the newest semver release.
   158→  # GHCR requires a bearer token even for public images.
   159→  buc_step "Discovering latest oras version from GHCR (no :latest tag published)"
   160→
   161→  buc_log_args "Obtaining GHCR bearer token (anonymous, scoped to oras repo)"
   162→  curl -sS \
   163→    "https://ghcr.io/token?scope=repository:oras-project/oras:pull&service=ghcr.io" \
   164→    -o "${z_oras_token_file}" 2>/dev/null \
   165→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch GHCR bearer token"
   166→
   167→  jq -r '.token // empty' "${z_oras_token_file}" > "${z_oras_token_value_file}" \
   168→    || buc_die "Failed to extract token from GHCR response"
   169→  local z_oras_token
   170→  z_oras_token=$(<"${z_oras_token_value_file}")
   171→  test -n "${z_oras_token}" || buc_die "GHCR returned empty bearer token"
   172→
   173→  buc_log_args "Fetching tag list using bearer token"
   174→  curl -sS \
   175→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_oras_token}" \
   176→    "https://ghcr.io/v2/oras-project/oras/tags/list?n=1000" \
   177→    -o "${z_oras_tags_file}" 2>/dev/null \
   178→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch oras tags from GHCR"
   179→
   180→  buc_log_args "Extracting newest stable semver tag"
   181→  # Filters to exact vN.N.N (no pre-release suffixes), sorts numerically, takes last
   182→  jq -r '
   183→    [.tags[] | select(test("^v[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+$"))]
   184→    | map(ltrimstr("v") | split(".") | map(tonumber))
   185→    | sort_by(.[0], .[1], .[2])
   186→    | last
   187→    | "v\(.[0]).\(.[1]).\(.[2])"
   188→  ' "${z_oras_tags_file}" > "${z_oras_tag_file}" \
   189→    || buc_die "Failed to extract semver tag from oras tags response"
   190→  local z_oras_tag
   191→  z_oras_tag=$(<"${z_oras_tag_file}")
   192→  test -n "${z_oras_tag}" -a "${z_oras_tag}" != "null" \
   193→    || buc_die "No stable oras semver tag found in GHCR tag list"
   194→  buc_info "oras discovered tag: ${z_oras_tag}"
   195→
   196→  # Image specifications: VARNAME|BASE_IMAGE|TAG
   197→  # Most images use :latest which always points to newest version.
   198→  # oras uses discovered semver tag above (no :latest published).
   199→  local z_specs=(
   200→    "RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF|gcr.io/go-containerregistry/gcrane|latest"
   201→    "RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF|ghcr.io/oras-project/oras|${z_oras_tag}"
   202→    "RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF|gcr.io/cloud-builders/gcloud|latest"
   203→    "RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF|gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker|latest"
   204→    "RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF|quay.io/skopeo/stable|latest"
   205→    "RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF|docker.io/library/alpine|latest"
   206→    "RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF|docker.io/anchore/syft|latest"
   207→    "RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF|docker.io/tonistiigi/binfmt|latest"
   208→  )
   209→
   210→  buc_step "Refreshing GCB tool image pins (vintage: ~${z_vintage})"
   211→
   212→  local z_updated=0
   213→  local z_unchanged=0
   214→
   215→  local z_spec=""
   216→  local z_varname=""
   217→  local z_image=""
   218→  local z_tag=""
   219→  local z_manifest_file=""
   220→  local z_digest_file=""
   221→  local z_oldref_file=""
   222→  local z_digest=""
   223→  local z_full_ref=""
   224→  local z_old_ref=""
   225→  local z_sed_value_file=""
   226→  local z_sed_vintage_file=""
   227→  for z_spec in "${z_specs[@]}"; do
   228→    IFS='|' read -r z_varname z_image z_tag <<< "${z_spec}"
   229→
   230→    z_manifest_file="${z_refresh_prefix}${z_varname}_manifest.json"
   231→    z_digest_file="${z_refresh_prefix}${z_varname}_digest.txt"
   232→    z_oldref_file="${z_refresh_prefix}${z_varname}_oldref.txt"
   233→    z_sed_value_file="${z_refresh_sed_prefix}${z_varname}_value.sh"
   234→    z_sed_vintage_file="${z_refresh_sed_prefix}${z_varname}_vintage.sh"
   235→
   236→    buc_step "Inspecting ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   237→
   238→    docker manifest inspect --verbose "${z_image}:${z_tag}" > "${z_manifest_file}" 2>/dev/null \
   239→      || buc_die "Failed to fetch manifest for ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   240→
   241→    buc_log_args "Extracting ${ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_OS}/${ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_ARCH} digest from manifest"
   242→    jq -r --arg os "${ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_OS}" --arg arch "${ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_ARCH}" '
   243→      if type == "array" then
   244→        [.[] | select(.Descriptor.platform.architecture == $arch
   245→                  and .Descriptor.platform.os == $os)][0].Descriptor.digest
   246→      else
   247→        .Descriptor.digest
   248→      end' \
   249→      "${z_manifest_file}" > "${z_digest_file}" \
   250→      || buc_die "Failed to extract digest for ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   251→    z_digest=$(<"${z_digest_file}")
   252→    test -n "${z_digest}" || buc_die "Empty digest for ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   253→    z_full_ref="${z_image}@${z_digest}"
   254→
   255→    grep "^${z_varname}=" "${z_rbrr_file}" | cut -d'"' -f2 > "${z_oldref_file}" \
   256→      || buc_die "No existing value for ${z_varname} in rbrr file"
   257→    z_old_ref=$(<"${z_oldref_file}")
   258→
   259→    if test "${z_old_ref}" = "${z_full_ref}"; then
   260→      buc_info "${z_varname}: unchanged"
   261→      z_unchanged=$((z_unchanged + 1))
   262→    else
   263→      buc_info "${z_varname}: ${z_old_ref} -> ${z_full_ref}"
   264→
   265→      sed "s|^${z_varname}=.*|${z_varname}=\"${z_full_ref}\"|" "${z_rbrr_file}" > "${z_sed_value_file}" \
   266→        || buc_die "Failed to sed value for ${z_varname}"
   267→      mv "${z_sed_value_file}" "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "Failed to update ${z_varname} in rbrr file"
   268→
   269→      buc_log_args "Updating vintage comment for ${z_varname}"
   270→      sed "/${z_varname}=/{
   271→        x
   272→        s|(~[^)]*)|(~${z_vintage})|
   273→        x
   274→      }" "${z_rbrr_file}" > "${z_sed_vintage_file}" \
   275→        || buc_die "Failed to update vintage comment for ${z_varname}"
   276→      test -s "${z_sed_vintage_file}" || buc_die "Vintage sed produced empty output for ${z_varname}"
   277→      mv "${z_sed_vintage_file}" "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "Failed to update vintage for ${z_varname}"
   278→
   279→      z_updated=$((z_updated + 1))
   280→    fi
   281→  done
   282→
   283→  buc_step "Refresh complete: ${z_updated} updated, ${z_unchanged} unchanged"
   284→}
   285→
   286→######################################################################
   287→# Main dispatch
   288→
   289→zrbrr_cli_kindle
   290→zrbcc_kindle
   291→
   292→z_command="${1:-}"
   293→
   294→case "${z_command}" in
   295→  validate|render)
   296→    z_file="${RBCC_RBRR_FILE}"
   297→    test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "RBRR regime file not found: ${z_file}"
   298→    case "${z_command}" in
   299→      validate) rbrr_validate "${z_file}" ;;
   300→      render)   rbrr_render "${z_file}" ;;
   301→    esac
   302→    ;;
   303→  refresh_gcb_pins)
   304→    rbrr_refresh_gcb_pins
   305→    ;;
   306→  *)
   307→    buc_die "Unknown command: ${z_command}. Usage: rbrr_cli.sh {validate|render|refresh_gcb_pins}"
   308→    ;;
   309→esac
   310→

    32→

    39→  RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS="${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS:-}"
    40→  RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION="${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION:-}"
    41→  RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN="${RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN:-}"
    42→  RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY="${RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY:-}"
    43→  RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID="${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID:-}"
    44→  RBRR_GCP_REGION="${RBRR_GCP_REGION:-}"

    46→  RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE="${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE:-}"
    47→  RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT="${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT:-}"
    48→  RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS="${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS:-}"
    49→  RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE="${RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE:-}"
    50→  RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE="${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE:-}"
    51→  RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE="${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE:-}"
    52→  RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF="${RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF:-}"
    53→  RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF="${RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF:-}"
    54→  RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF="${RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF:-}"
    55→  RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF="${RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF:-}"
    56→  RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF="${RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF:-}"
    57→  RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF="${RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF:-}"
    58→  RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF="${RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF:-}"
    59→  RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF="${RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF:-}"
    60→
    61→  # Detect unexpected RBRR_ variables
    62→  local z_known="RBRR_VESSEL_DIR RBRR_DNS_SERVER RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID RBRR_GCP_REGION RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF"
    63→  ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED=()

    70→  done
    71→
    72→  # Build rollup of all RBRR_ variables for passing to scripts/containers

    76→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME='${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}' "
    77→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME='${RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME}' "
    78→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ='${RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ}' "
    79→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS='${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS}' "
    80→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION='${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}' "
    81→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN='${RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN}' "

    83→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID='${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}' "

    85→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY='${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}' "
    86→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE='${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}' "
    87→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT='${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}' "
    88→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE='${RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE}' "
    89→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE='${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}' "
    90→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE='${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}' "
    91→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF}' "
    92→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF}' "
    93→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF}' "

    95→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF}' "
    96→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF}' "
    97→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF}' "
    98→  ZRBRR_ROLLUP+="RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF='${RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF}'"
    99→
   100→  # Build docker env args array for container injection
   101→  # Usage: docker run "${ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" ...
   102→  # Currently only RBRR_DNS_SERVER is needed by sentry; add others as needed
   103→  ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV=()

   109→zrbrr_sentinel() {
   110→  test "${ZRBRR_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbrr not kindled - call zrbrr_kindle first"
   111→}
   112→
   113→# Validate RBRR variables via buv_env_* (dies on first error)
   114→# Prerequisite: kindle must have been called; buv_validation.sh must be sourced
   115→zrbrr_validate_fields() {
   116→  zrbrr_sentinel
   117→
   118→  # Die on unexpected variables
   119→  if test ${#ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED[@]} -gt 0; then
   120→    buc_die "Unexpected RBRR_ variables: ${ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED[*]}"
   121→  fi
   122→
   123→  # Container Registry Configuration
   124→  buv_env_string      RBRR_VESSEL_DIR              1    255
   125→  buv_env_ipv4        RBRR_DNS_SERVER
   126→
   127→  # Machine Configuration
   128→  buv_env_xname       RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME     1     64
   129→  buv_env_xname       RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME     1     64
   130→  buv_env_string      RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ            1    512
   131→  buv_env_string      RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS      1    512
   132→  buv_env_string      RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION   1     16
   133→  buv_env_fqin        RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN   1    256
   134→  buv_env_string      RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY         1    128
   135→  buv_env_gname       RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID          6     63
   136→  buv_env_gname       RBRR_GCP_REGION              1     32
   137→
   138→  # Google Artifact Registry Configuration
   139→  buv_env_gname       RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY          1     63
   140→
   141→  # Google Cloud Build Configuration
   142→  buv_env_string      RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE        3     64
   143→  buv_env_string      RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT             2     10
   144→  buv_env_decimal     RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS  1     999
   145→
   146→  # Service Account Configuration Files
   147→  buv_env_string      RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE         1    512
   148→  buv_env_string      RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE     1    512
   149→  buv_env_string      RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE      1    512
   150→
   151→  # GCB image pins (digest-pinned)
   152→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF
   153→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF
   154→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF
   155→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF
   156→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF
   157→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF
   158→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF
   159→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF
   160→
   161→  # Validate directories exist
   162→  buv_dir_exists "${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}"
   163→
   164→  # Validate manifest platforms format (space-separated identifiers)
   165→  local z_platform=""
   166→  for z_platform in ${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS}; do
   167→    if ! printf '%s' "${z_platform}" | grep -q '^[a-z0-9_]\+$'; then
   168→      buc_warn "Invalid platform format in RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS: ${z_platform}"
   169→      buc_step "Expected format: lowercase alphanumeric with underscores"
   170→      buc_die "Invalid RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS"
   171→    fi
   172→  done
   173→
   174→  # Validate timeout format (number followed by 's' for seconds)
   175→  if ! printf '%s' "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" | grep -q '^[0-9]\+s$'; then
   176→    buc_warn "Invalid RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT format: ${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}"
   177→    buc_step "Expected format: number followed by 's' (e.g., 1200s)"
   178→    buc_die "Invalid RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT"
   179→  fi
   180→
   181→  # Validate Podman version format (e.g., 5.5 or 5.5.1)
   182→  if ! printf '%s' "${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}" | grep -q '^[0-9]\+\.[0-9]\+\(\.[0-9]\+\)\?$'; then
   183→    buc_warn "Invalid RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION format: ${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}"
   184→    buc_step "Expected format: semantic version like 5.5 or 5.5.1"
   185→    buc_die "Invalid RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION"
   186→  fi
   187→}

    99→# Extract natural tag from podman init output
   100→zrbv_extract_natural_tag() {
   101→  local z_init_output_file="$1"
   102→
   103→  grep "Looking up Podman Machine image at" "${z_init_output_file}"        \
   104→    | sed 's/.*Looking up Podman Machine image at \(.*\) to create VM/\1/' \
   105→    > "${ZRBV_NATURAL_TAG_FILE}"

   110→# Compare two files and return error code if different
   111→zrbv_is_different_predicate() {
   112→  local z_file1="$1"
   113→  local z_file2="$2"
   114→
   115→  local z_content1="$(<"${z_file1}")"
   116→  local z_content2="$(<"${z_file2}")"
   117→
   118→  if test "${z_content1}" = "${z_content2}"; then
   119→    return 0
   120→  else
   121→    buc_warn "File content mismatch detected!"
   122→    buc_warn "File 1 (${z_file1}) contents:"
   123→    echo "${z_content1}"
   124→    buc_warn "File 2 (${z_file2}) contents:"
   125→    echo "${z_content2}"

   138→# Stop and remove a VM if it exists
   139→zrbv_remove_vm() {

   141→
   142→  if podman machine inspect "${z_vm_name}" > "${ZRBV_PODMAN_REMOVE_PREFIX}${z_vm_name}.txt"; then
   143→    buc_info       "Stopping ${z_vm_name}..."

   145→    buc_info       "Removing ${z_vm_name}..."

   152→# Prepare ignite machine: start if present, or fully reinit if force_reinit=true
   153→zrbv_ignite_bootstrap() {
   154→  local z_force_reinit="${1}"
   155→
   156→  buc_info "Bootstrapping ignite machine: ${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}"
   157→
   158→  if podman machine inspect "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" &>/dev/null; then
   159→    buc_info "Stopping existing ignite machine (if running)..."
   160→    podman machine stop "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" 2>/dev/null \
   161→      || buc_die "Could not stop existing ignite VM cleanly"
   162→  fi
   163→
   164→  if test "${z_force_reinit}" = "true"; then
   165→    buc_step "Removing existing ignite machine due to force_reinit..."
   166→    zrbv_remove_vm "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" || buc_die "Removal failed."
   167→  fi
   168→
   169→  if ! podman machine inspect "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" &>/dev/null; then
   170→    buc_step "Creating ignite VM with natural podman init..."
   171→    podman machine init --log-level=debug      "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" \
   172→                                            2> "${ZRBV_IGNITE_INIT_STDERR}"  \
   173→         | "${ZRBV_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbupmis_Scrub.sh" "${ZRBV_IGNITE_INIT_STDOUT}"  \
   174→      || buc_die "Bad init."
   175→
   176→    buc_step "Starting ignite machine..."
   177→    podman machine start "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" || buc_die "Failed to start ignite machine"
   178→
   179→    buc_step "Installing crane..."
   180→    podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" --                        \
   181→        "curl -sL ${RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ} | sudo tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin crane" \
   182→        || buc_die "crane fail"
   183→
   184→    buc_step "Verify crane installation..."
   185→    podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" -- \
   186→        "crane version" || buc_die "crane confirm fail."
   187→
   188→    buc_step "Installing tools..."
   189→    podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" -- \
   190→        "sudo dnf install -y jq" || buc_die "tools install fail"
   191→  else
   192→    buc_step "Restarting ignite machine..."
   193→    podman machine start "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" || buc_die "Failed to restart ignite machine"
   194→  fi
   195→
   196→  buc_step "Ignite machine ready with skopeo installed"
   197→}
