   207→# Helper function to process one image type
   208→zrbv_process_image_type() {
   209→  local z_manifest_file="$1"
   210→  local z_entries_file="$2"
   211→  local z_decoded_prefix="$3"
   212→  local z_prefix="$4"
   213→  local z_fqin="$5"
   214→  local z_family_name="$6"
   215→
   216→  buc_step "Retrieving manifest for ${z_family_name} image: ${z_fqin}"
   217→  podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" --        \
   218→        "crane manifest ${z_fqin} | jq ." > "${z_manifest_file}" \
   219→      || buc_die "Failed to retrieve ${z_family_name} manifest"
   220→
   221→  buc_step "${z_family_name} Manifest:"
   222→  cat "${z_manifest_file}"
   223→
   224→  buc_step "Extract manifest entries for ${z_family_name}..."
   225→  jq -r '.manifests[] | @base64' "${z_manifest_file}" > "${z_entries_file}" \
   226→    || buc_die "Failed to extract ${z_family_name} entries"
   227→
   228→  buc_step "${z_family_name} family images:"
   229→  local z_entry_num=0
   230→  while IFS= read -r z_entry; do
   231→    z_entry_num=$((z_entry_num + 1))
   232→    local       z_decoded="${z_decoded_prefix}${z_entry_num}.json"
   233→    local     z_arch_file="${z_decoded_prefix}${z_entry_num}_arch.txt"
   234→    local z_disktype_file="${z_decoded_prefix}${z_entry_num}_disktype.txt"
   235→    local   z_digest_file="${z_decoded_prefix}${z_entry_num}_digest.txt"
   236→
   237→    base64 -d <<< "${z_entry}"              > "${z_decoded}"
   238→    jq -r '.platform.architecture'          "${z_decoded}" > "${z_arch_file}"
   239→    jq -r '.annotations.disktype // "base"' "${z_decoded}" > "${z_disktype_file}"
   240→    jq -r '.digest'                         "${z_decoded}" > "${z_digest_file}"
   241→
   242→    local z_arch z_disktype z_digest
   243→    z_arch=$(<"${z_arch_file}")
   244→    z_disktype=$(<"${z_disktype_file}")
   245→    z_digest=$(<"${z_digest_file}")
   246→    local z_platform_spec="${z_prefix}_${z_arch}_${z_disktype}"
   247→
   248→    echo "${z_digest}"      > "${ZRBV_FACT_DIGEST_PREFIX}${z_platform_spec}"
   249→    echo "${z_fqin}"        > "${ZRBV_FACT_SOURCE_PREFIX}${z_platform_spec}"
   250→    echo "${z_arch}"        > "${ZRBV_FACT_ARCH_PREFIX}${z_platform_spec}"
   251→    echo "${z_disktype}"    > "${ZRBV_FACT_DISKTYPE_PREFIX}${z_platform_spec}"
   252→
   253→    echo "  ${ZRBV_GIT_REGISTRY}/${RBRR_REGISTRY_OWNER}/${RBRR_REGISTRY_NAME}:podvm-${RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY}-${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}-${z_platform_spec}"
   254→  done < "${z_entries_file}"
   255→}

   260→rbv_nuke() {
   261→  # Name parameters
   262→  local z_yes_opt="${1:-}"
   263→
   264→  # Handle documentation mode
   265→  buc_doc_brief "Completely reset the podman virtual machine environment"
   266→  buc_doc_oparm "yes_opt" "If 'YES', then skip confirmation step"
   267→  buc_doc_lines "Destroys ALL containers, VMs, and VM cache"
   268→  buc_doc_lines "Requires explicit YES confirmation"
   269→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   270→
   271→  # Ensure module started
   272→  zrbv_sentinel
   273→
   274→  # Perform command
   275→  buv_dir_exists "${RBRS_PODMAN_ROOT_DIR}" || buc_warn "Podman directory not found."
   276→
   277→  buc_step "WARNING: This will destroy all podman VMs and cache found in ${RBRS_PODMAN_ROOT_DIR}"
   278→
   279→  # Skip confirmation if YES was passed as parameter
   280→  test "${z_yes_opt}" = "YES" || buc_require "This will destroy all podman VMs and cache!" "YES"
   281→
   282→  buc_step "Stopping all containers..."
   283→  podman stop -a  || buc_warn "Attempt to stop all containers failed; normal if machine not started."
   284→
   285→  buc_step "Removing all containers..."
   286→  podman rm -a -f || buc_warn "Attempt to remove all containers failed; normal if machine not started."
   287→
   288→  buc_step "Removing all podman machines..."
   289→  for z_vm in $(podman machine list -q); do
   290→    z_vm="${z_vm%\*}"  # Remove trailing asterisk indicating 'current vm'
   291→    zrbv_remove_vm "${z_vm}" || buc_die "Attempt to remove VM ${z_vm} failed."
   292→  done
   293→
   294→  buc_step "Deleting VM cache directory..."
   295→  rm -rf "${RBRS_PODMAN_ROOT_DIR}/machine"/*
   296→
   297→  buc_success "Podman VM environment reset complete"
   298→}

   300→# Mirror VM images to GHCR
   301→rbv_mirror() {
   302→  # Handle documentation mode
   303→  buc_doc_brief "Process manifests for WSL and standard machine-os images, then upload needed disk images to GHCR"
   304→  buc_doc_lines "Queries quay.io/podman/machine-os-wsl and quay.io/podman/machine-os"
   305→  buc_doc_lines "Uses crane manifest to retrieve raw manifests, formatted with jq"
   306→  buc_doc_lines "Validates that all RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS are available"
   307→  buc_doc_lines "Downloads needed disk images and packages them as container images"
   308→  buc_doc_lines "Builds all images locally, creates local manifest list, then single push to GHCR"
   309→  buc_doc_lines "Tags each platform image individually for direct access"
   310→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   311→
   312→  # Ensure module started
   313→  zrbv_sentinel
   314→
   315→  # Perform command
   316→  buc_step "Prepare fresh ignite machine with crane and tools..."
   317→  zrbv_ignite_bootstrap false || buc_die "Failed to create temp machine"
   318→
   319→  buc_step "Generate new identity for this build..."
   320→  local z_new_identity
   321→  z_new_identity=$(date +'%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
   322→  buc_info "New identity: ${z_new_identity}"
   323→
   324→  buc_step "Potential container image names for caching:"
   325→
   326→  # Process each image type
   327→  zrbv_process_image_type        \
   328→    "${ZRBV_MOW_MANIFEST_JSON}"  \
   329→    "${ZRBV_MOW_ENTRIES_JSON}"   \
   330→    "${ZRBV_MOW_DECODED_PREFIX}" \
   331→    "mow"                        \
   332→    "quay.io/podman/machine-os-wsl:${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}" \
   333→    "Machine-OS-WSL"
   334→
   335→  zrbv_process_image_type        \
   336→    "${ZRBV_MOS_MANIFEST_JSON}"  \
   337→    "${ZRBV_MOS_ENTRIES_JSON}"   \
   338→    "${ZRBV_MOS_DECODED_PREFIX}" \
   339→    "mos"                        \
   340→    "quay.io/podman/machine-os:${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}" \
   341→    "Machine-OS standard"
   342→
   343→  buc_step "Validating RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS availability..."
   344→
   345→  local z_missing_images=""
   346→  for z_needed_image in ${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS}; do
   347→    if test ! -f "${ZRBV_FACT_DIGEST_PREFIX}${z_needed_image}"; then
   348→      z_missing_images="${z_missing_images} ${z_needed_image}"
   349→    else
   350→      buc_info "Found needed image: ${z_needed_image}"
   351→    fi
   352→  done
   353→
   354→  test -z "${z_missing_images}" || buc_die "Missing required disk images:${z_missing_images}"
   355→
   356→  buc_step "All needed disk images are available in upstream manifests"
   357→
   358→  buc_step "Setting up VM temporary dir..."
   359→  podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" --              \
   360→      "rm -rf ${ZRBV_VM_TEMP_DIR} && mkdir -p ${ZRBV_VM_TEMP_DIR}" \
   361→    || buc_die "Failed to create VM temp directory"
   362→
   363→  zrbv_validate_pat || buc_die "PAT validation failed"
   364→  zrbv_login_ghcr "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" || buc_die "Podman login failed"
   365→
   366→  buc_step "Building container images..."
   367→  for z_needed_image in ${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS}; do
   368→    buc_step "Processing: ${z_needed_image}"
   369→
   370→    # Read facts
   371→    local z_digest z_source_fqin
   372→    z_digest=$(<"${ZRBV_FACT_DIGEST_PREFIX}${z_needed_image}")
   373→    z_source_fqin=$(<"${ZRBV_FACT_SOURCE_PREFIX}${z_needed_image}")
   374→
   375→    podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" --                                       \
   376→        "crane manifest ${z_source_fqin}@${z_digest} | jq -r '.layers[]'" > "${ZRBV_LAYERS_JSON}" \
   377→      || buc_die "Failed to extract layers for ${z_needed_image}"
   378→
   379→    jq -r 'select(.annotations."org.opencontainers.image.title" // .mediaType | test("disk|raw|tar|qcow2|machine")) | .digest + ":" + .mediaType' \
   380→           "${ZRBV_LAYERS_JSON}" > "${ZRBV_BLOB_INFO}" \
   381→      || buc_die "Failed to find disk blob for ${z_needed_image}"
   382→
   383→    local z_blob_info
   384→    IFS= read -r z_blob_info < "${ZRBV_BLOB_INFO}" || true
   385→
   386→    test -n "${z_blob_info}" || buc_die "No disk blob found in manifest for ${z_needed_image}"
   387→
   388→    local z_blob_digest="${z_blob_info%:*}"
   389→    local z_temp="${z_blob_info#*:}"
   390→    local z_media_type="${z_temp#*:}"
   391→
   392→    local z_extension="tar"
   393→    case "${z_media_type}" in
   394→      *zstd*) z_extension="tar.zst" ;;
   395→      *gzip*) z_extension="tar.gz"  ;;
   396→      *xz*)   z_extension="tar.xz"  ;;
   397→    esac
   398→
   399→    echo "${z_extension}" > "${ZRBV_FACT_EXTENSION_PREFIX}${z_needed_image}"

   402→    podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" --              \
   403→        "crane blob ${z_source_fqin}@${z_blob_digest} > ${z_vm_blob_file}" \
   404→      || buc_die "Failed to download blob for ${z_needed_image}"
   405→
   406→    local z_dockerfile_name="Dockerfile.${z_needed_image}"
   407→    local z_dockerfile_path="${ZRBV_VM_TEMP_DIR}/${z_dockerfile_name}"
   408→
   409→    podman machine ssh "${RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME}" --             \
   410→        "echo '${z_new_identity}' > ${ZRBV_VM_TEMP_DIR}/identity.txt" \
   411→      || buc_die "Failed to create identity file"
   412→
   413→    {
   414→        echo "FROM scratch"
   415→        echo "COPY blob_${z_needed_image}.${z_extension} /disk-image.tar"
   416→        echo "COPY identity.txt /identity.txt"

   420→

   425→      || buc_die "Failed to build image for ${z_needed_image}"
   426→
   427→  done

   434→    local z_local_tag="localhost/podvm-${z_needed_image}:${z_new_identity}"
